description: NOWPayments is a cryptocurrency payment processing service for businesses to accept crypto payments, create invoices, run payouts, and automate related payment flows. It offers hosted and API-based tools for payments, payouts, and customer-facing checkout experiences.
summary: NOWPayments exposes a documented REST API at `https://api.nowpayments.io` authenticated with an API key; docs also describe IPN webhook signature verification with a separate IPN secret. No first-party GraphQL API, CLI, or documented MCP connect endpoint was found on nowpayments.io.
